questions.question: BI dashboard показывает revenue = $0 за вчера. Pipeline completed successfully (no errors). Как предотвратить такое в будущем?

options.text: Data quality gate между Silver и Gold: 1) Freshness check: MAX(order_date) = yesterday, 2) Volume check: row_count > 1000 (business minimum), 3) Accuracy check: SUM(amount) > 0. Если любой check fails → block Gold update, alert P1

questions.studyHint: Повторите раздел Data Quality Dimensions и Observability
questions.explanation: Pipeline 'success' ≠ data correctness. Quality gate pattern: validate data BEFORE promoting to Gold. Three checks: freshness (data is current), volume (enough rows), accuracy (values make sense). Block promotion + alert = prevent bad data from reaching dashboards. Shift-left: catch at Silver, not at dashboard.

questions.question: Понедельник: daily order count = 45K (обычно 100K ± 10K). Anomaly detection сработал. Но это национальный праздник — orders действительно меньше. Как улучшить detection?

options.text: Seasonal decomposition: учитывать day-of-week, holidays, seasonal patterns. Сравнивать с тем же днём прошлого года / прошлого месяца. Holiday calendar integration → adjust expected baseline. Z-score с seasonal adjustment вместо absolute threshold

questions.explanation: Simple Z-score без seasonality = false positives на праздники, weekends. Seasonal decomposition: extract trend + seasonal + residual. Compare residual against threshold. Holiday calendar: expected_count[holiday] = 50% of normal. ML-based: train on historical patterns including seasonality.

questions.question: Data quality framework: 500 checks на 200 таблицах. Ежедневно 20-30 checks fail. Команда игнорирует alerts (alert fatigue). Как исправить?

options.text: Tiered alerting: P1 (revenue-impacting, customer-facing) → PagerDuty immediate. P2 (internal reports, non-critical) → Slack channel, fix within SLA. P3 (warnings, anomalies) → daily digest email. Каждый check categorized по business impact. Review tier assignments quarterly
Увеличить thresholds чтобы меньше checks fail

questions.studyHint: Повторите раздел Alerting Strategy и SLA Design
questions.explanation: Alert fatigue = team ignores all alerts. Solution: severity tiers по business impact. P1 (3-5 checks): revenue/customer-impacting → immediate action. P2 (20-30): internal, within-SLA. P3 (rest): informational. Reducing checks (a) loses coverage. Raising thresholds (d) misses real problems. Tiering: same coverage, actionable response.

questions.question: dbt pipeline обновляет 50 таблиц в Gold layer. Где разместить data quality checks: до dbt run, внутри dbt (tests), или после dbt run?

options.text: Только до dbt run — проверить source данные
Только после dbt run — проверить результат
Все checks внутри dbt tests — один инструмент

Multi-layer: 1) Pre-dbt: source freshness checks (dbt source freshness). 2) In-dbt: schema tests (not_null, unique, relationships) + custom tests (business rules). 3) Post-dbt: Great Expectations / Soda для cross-table validation, statistical checks, trend anomalies. Defense in depth

questions.studyHint: Повторите раздел Data Quality Gates — Shift-Left Testing
questions.explanation: Multi-layer quality: Pre-dbt catches stale/missing source data before expensive transforms run. In-dbt tests: schema-level (referential integrity, uniqueness) + business rules (amount > 0). Post-dbt: statistical validation impossible in dbt (distribution checks, ML-based anomaly detection). Each layer catches different failure modes.
